title: Borkyne
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Image}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Borkyne |region=*[[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Borkyne system/Legends|Borkyne system]] *[[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]]{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-outer-rim-sectors|text=The Essential Atlas Extra: Outer Rim Sectors|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the [[Bes Ber Bikade sector/Legends|Bes Ber Bikade sector]] in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] as defined by the [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''. |sector=[[Bes Ber Bikade sector/Legends|Bes Ber Bikade sector]] |system=[[Borkyne system/Legends|Borkyne system]] |coordinates=L-15 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Borkyne system/Legends|Borkyne system]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Right now you need me more than I need this job.''"
"''I need you less than you might think. Certainly less than ''you'' need an Imperial pardon for that mess you left on Borkyne—|Grand Admiral Mitth'raw'nuruodo, posing as Jodo Cast, to Dagon Niriz|"[[Side Trip]]"}} '''Borkyne''' was location that shared its name with the [[Borkyne system/Legends|Borkyne system]] of the [[Bes Ber Bikade sector/Legends|Bes Ber Bikade sector]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dagon Niriz]] claimed that [[Jodo Kast]] needed an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pardon for a mess made on Borkyne. ==Appearances== *"[[Side Trip]]" {{Reprint|Side Trip}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Borkyne}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Borkyne }} [[Category:Bes Ber Bikade sector locations]] [[Category:Locations along the Corellian Trade Spine]] [[Category:Planets in the Expansion Region]] [[Category:Planets in the Western Reaches]]
